issues.description: Effect structure is incomplete. 'GiveDon' action is present but the effect is missing a condition to specify 'from your DON!! deck'. The trigger should include a condition or the action should clarify the source.

'GiveDon' with count:1 adds a DON!! card to your DON!! pool, not adds from deck and rests it. Correct action should be 'AttachDon' or a custom action that represents 'add from DON!! deck and rest'. Current DSL does not match card text.
Second effect with trigger 'Trigger' and action 'PlaySelf' is extraneous and not supported by card text. Card has only one effect: [On Play] add up to 1 DON!! card from DON!! deck and rest it.
Missing 'rest it' action. After adding the DON!! card, it must be rested. Current DSL only has GiveDon with no Rest action.
